integration_validation_v2.gap: MT-194 requires diagnostics validation-matrix rows for reset and orphan diagnostics. The diagnostics validation matrix catalog stops at MT-175 and contains no reset/orphan matrix_kind or rows. Cited mt_194_idempotency_dedupes_repeated_apply tests the WP-KERNEL-004 IdempotencyLedger (in-memory), not a reset/orphan matrix.
integration_validation_v2.evidence: src/atelier/state_probe.rs:782-792 (catalog kinds only MT-171..175; no reset/orphan); tests/session_checkpoint_tests.rs:181-201 (mt_194 tests IdempotencyLedger::in_memory dedupe — wrong feature, in-memory not managed PG matrix)

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.

acceptance_criteria: MT-194 [Model-Workflow-Diagnostics] Reset And Orphan Diagnostic Validation Matrix -- Create validation rows for reset and orphan diagnostics only.
proof_targets: cargo test + runtime proof vs PostgreSQL/EventLedger
scope.risk_if_missed: CKC parity loss for Reset And Orphan Diagnostic Validation Matrix
